channel.title: iPad on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in iPad on Tech Tracker

item.title: Apple want to bring iPad assembly to India!
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-hmQfJXTxHcA/YC6bBQ7lBDI/AAAAAAAADTo/gDkGcQIEHRkzbuksTloba4mYB4RLgVpOACLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1613667068451403-0.png" alt="Apple want to bring iPad assembly to India!" title="Apple want to bring iPad assembly to India!"> Apple is trying to bring their iPad assembly plant in India due to various reasons apple intentionally decreasing dependence with china and looking forward to establish in India due to India’s make in india & make In India programmes and it’s polices apple very much interested to invest in India as china and India labour costs are similar but compared to china, India labor costs are little high, however many companies already invested and build many assembly plants and manufacturing plants in India.
